title: F3+S Confirm
description: Preventing potential lagging caused by F3+S hotkey by adding a double-check.
body:
Since 1.19.4, Mojang has introduced a hotkey `F3+S` to "dump dynamic textures".
Generally, dumped files are in the `.minecraft/screenshots/debug/` folder, with mid-60s images sized around 1.6 MiB, and they will occupy more storage if you're modded.

Think if a player lags for mistakenly pressed this hotkey, no matter combating or crafting, the lagging will bring an awful experience.

In this mod, hotkey `F3+S` is disabled. And if you want to confirm dumping dynamic textures, type command `/f3sconfirm`.

![F3+S is disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NSj4jq9Y/images/2d41c3b698340edc35830daf980b1beacf3ee12a.png)

![Type /f3sconfirm to confirm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NSj4jq9Y/images/eadfbb9335f614fc78039b730e328afd9a2cc007.png)
